releases.title: Personal AI Workspace v1.0 — Initial end-to-end workspace creator
releases.summary: Introduced the first complete guided installation flow for a persistent, user-controlled AI workspace.

releases.title: Personal AI Workspace v1.1 — Creator attribution page
releases.summary: Added the dedicated Creators page, original attribution rules, and local deployment metadata.

releases.title: Personal AI Workspace v1.2 — System manifesto and About page
releases.summary: Added the mandatory first-response manifesto and the About the System page.

releases.title: Personal AI Workspace v1.3 — Modular Constitution
releases.summary: Replaced the single long Constitution with a modular index, domain modules, and truncation-safe loading rules.

releases.title: Personal AI Workspace v1.4 — Owner-governed structure changes
releases.summary: Added explicit approval before structural changes plus final personalization and project-instruction snippets.

releases.title: Personal AI Workspace v1.5 — Sensitive context and System Evolution Lab
releases.summary: Added controlled retention of materially relevant sensitive context and a human-governed system evolution loop.

releases.title: Personal AI Workspace v1.5.1 — Weekly review due-check
releases.summary: Added a mandatory due-check so session-triggered weekly evolution reviews are not forgotten.
